docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICHTER, DAVID
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICHTER, DAVID

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-18-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-18-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF DAVIS RICHTER IS PRESENT. APPEARING BY COURTCALL. DEFENDANT STUBHUB, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY NIC CONLIN, LITIGATION PARALEGAL. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICHTER, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT STUBHUB, INC.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE [X]GRANTED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-30-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STUBHUB, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICHTER, DAVID IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STUBHUB, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER (SC-152) ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL: THE REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL IS APPROVED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-25-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-18-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICHTER, DAVID

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2017 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,751.00 FILED BY RICHTER, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT STUBHUB, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-25-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT STUBHUB, INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2017 ORDERED DESTROYED
